quit_dialog.title: Quit session?
quit_dialog.body: Your progress will not be saved.

health_reminder.listen: Listen to your body. Adapt the effort — quality over quantity.
health_reminder.stop_pain: If you feel pain, stop immediately.

amrap_view.explanation: Cycle through the exercises. Complete as many rounds as possible in the time cap.
amrap_view.tracking_hint: Tap each time you complete a full round to track your progress

emom_view.explanation: Complete the exercises within the minute. Remaining time is your recovery.

signup_nudge.title: Don't lose your progress
signup_nudge.body: Without an account, this session disappears. Create your free account to track your progress and keep your momentum.

premium_teaser.heading: You're crushing it.
premium_teaser.body: With Premium, your next session is custom-generated in 30 s, or start a full program tailored to your goals.

health_disclaimer.title: Health notice
health_disclaimer.subtitle: Please read carefully before starting.
health_disclaimer.body_editorial: Wan2Fit provides editorial and informational content related to physical activity. It is not personalised sports coaching or supervision by a qualified sports educator.
health_disclaimer.body_responsibility: Sessions are general exercise suggestions. You are solely responsible for their execution and adaptation to your physical condition.
health_disclaimer.warning_consult: Consult a doctor to check your fitness for exercise
health_disclaimer.warning_no_contraindication: Do not exercise if you have a medical contraindication
health_disclaimer.warning_stop_pain: Stop immediately if you feel pain or discomfort
health_disclaimer.legal_note: Not recommended without medical advice for people with cardiac conditions, joint disorders, pregnancy or any condition that may be aggravated by exercise. For adults aged 18 and over only.
health_disclaimer.checkbox_label: I have read and understood this notice. I exercise at my own risk and declare I have no medical contraindication.

block_health_disclaimer.consult_doctor: Consult a doctor if in doubt
block_health_disclaimer.no_contraindication: Make sure you have no contraindications
block_health_disclaimer.stop_pain: Stop immediately if you feel pain

error_boundary.message: An error occurred during the session.
error_boundary.detail: The session could not be displayed correctly.
